# GoTimer.org — Full Documentation

> GoTimer is a free, browser-based timer platform for board games, fitness, photography, wellness, productivity, and cooking. No app download, no signup required — works in any modern browser at https://gotimer.org.

Website: https://gotimer.org
Category: Web Application / Timer Platform
Price: Free (no ads)
Platform: Any modern web browser (mobile, tablet, desktop)
Account Required: No (timers work without login; challenges require a free account)
Last updated: 2026-04-20

---

## Overview

GoTimer is a free, browser-based timer platform for board games, fitness, photography, wellness, productivity, and cooking. No app download, no signup required — works in any modern browser at https://gotimer.org.

GoTimer offers 10 timer strategies, 28 specialized presets across 6 categories, and a challenge tracking system for competitive play.

---

## Timer Strategies (10)

### Countdown Timer (`countdown`)

A simple countdown timer that counts down from a set duration.

- Route: https://gotimer.org/countdown
- Setup: https://gotimer.org/countdown-setup
- Embed: https://gotimer.org/countdown/embed
- Supported params: duration, alert_at
- Default config:
    {
      "duration": 300
    }

### Chess Clock (`chess-clock`)

A two-player chess clock where each player has their own time bank.

- Route: https://gotimer.org/chess-clock
- Setup: https://gotimer.org/chess-clock-setup
- Embed: https://gotimer.org/chess-clock/embed
- Supported params: duration_per_player, increment
- Default config:
    {
      "duration_per_player": 600,
      "increment": 0
    }

### Round Timer (`round-timer`)

A round-based timer for sports and combat games with work and rest periods.

- Route: https://gotimer.org/round-timer
- Setup: https://gotimer.org/round-timer-setup
- Embed: https://gotimer.org/round-timer/embed
- Supported params: round_duration, rest_duration, rounds
- Default config:
    {
      "round_duration": 180,
      "rest_duration": 60,
      "rounds": 3
    }

### Interval Timer (`interval`)

A work/rest interval timer, perfect for Pomodoro technique, HIIT workouts, and timed study sessions.

- Route: https://gotimer.org/countdown
- Supported params: work, rest, rounds
- Default config:
    {
      "work": 1500,
      "rest": 300,
      "rounds": 4
    }

### Multi-Step Timer (`multi-step`)

A sequential timer that runs through multiple named steps, each with its own duration.

- Route: https://gotimer.org/countdown
- Supported params: steps
- Default config:
    {
      "steps": [
        {
          "name": "Step 1",
          "duration": 60
        },
        {
          "name": "Step 2",
          "duration": 60
        }
      ]
    }

### Ambient Timer (`ambient`)

A long-form ambient timer that counts up or down with optional interval notifications.

- Route: https://gotimer.org/countdown
- Supported params: duration, interval
- Default config:
    {
      "duration": 3600,
      "interval": 600
    }

### Calculator Timer (`calculator-timer`)

A timer that computes durations based on input values (e.g., reciprocity correction for film photography).

- Route: https://gotimer.org/countdown
- Supported params: metered_time, mode
- Default config:
    {
      "metered_time": 1,
      "mode": "reciprocity"
    }

### Multi-Timer (`multi-timer`)

Run multiple independent countdown timers simultaneously.

- Route: https://gotimer.org/countdown
- Supported params: timers
- Default config:
    {
      "timers": [
        {
          "name": "Timer 1",
          "duration": 300
        },
        {
          "name": "Timer 2",
          "duration": 600
        }
      ]
    }

### Turn Timer (`turn-timer`)

Per-player turn countdown for 2-8 players in board games and group activities.

- Route: https://gotimer.org/countdown
- Supported params: players, time_per_turn
- Default config:
    {
      "players": 2,
      "time_per_turn": 60
    }

### Enlarger Timer (`enlarger`)

F-stop timing and test strip mode for darkroom printing.

- Route: https://gotimer.org/countdown
- Supported params: base_time, mode, strips, stop_increment
- Default config:
    {
      "base_time": 10,
      "mode": "f-stop"
    }

---

## Categories (6)

### 🎲 Board Games

Keep game night moving with free, mobile-friendly timers. No app download, no signup — just pick a timer and play.

- URL: https://gotimer.org/board-games
- Presets (4):
  - **Countdown Timer** (`board-countdown`): Set a time limit for turns or rounds — defaults: `{"duration":120}`
  - **Chess Clock** (`board-chess-clock`): Two-player time control for competitive games — defaults: `{"duration_per_player":600,"increment":0}`
  - **Round Timer** (`board-round-timer`): Track rounds and total game time — defaults: `{"round_duration":180,"rest_duration":60,"rounds":3}`
  - **Turn Timer** (`board-turn-timer`): Per-player turn countdown for 2-8 players — defaults: `{"players":4,"time_per_turn":60}`

- FAQ:
  **Q: What is a chess clock for board games?**
  A: A chess clock is a two-player timer where each player has their own countdown. After making a move, you tap the clock to switch to your opponent’s timer.

  **Q: How do I time board game turns?**
  A: For two-player games, use the Chess Clock. For group games, use the Countdown Timer. For tracking rounds, use the Round Timer.

  **Q: Can I track game scores with friends?**
  A: Yes! GoTimer’s challenge system lets you create ongoing rivalries, invite friends, and track wins over time.

### 🎞️ Photography

Film development timers, reciprocity calculators, and darkroom tools. Free, browser-based, safelight-safe.

- URL: https://gotimer.org/photography
- Presets (6):
  - **Film Development Timer** (`film-development`): Multi-step sequential timer for B&W, C-41, and E-6 processes — defaults: `{"steps":[{"name":"Developer","duration":480},{"name":"Stop Bath","duration":60},{"name":"Fixer","duration":300},{"name":"Wash","duration":300}]}`
  - **Long Exposure Calculator** (`long-exposure-calculator`): Reciprocity failure correction for film photography — defaults: `{"metered_time":1,"mode":"reciprocity"}`
  - **Stand Development Timer** (`stand-development`): Long-form ambient timer for stand and semi-stand development — defaults: `{"duration":3600,"interval":1800}`
  - **Enlarger Timer** (`enlarger-timer`): F-stop timing and test strip mode for darkroom printing — defaults: `{"base_time":10,"mode":"f-stop"}`
  - **Cyanotype Timer** (`cyanotype`): UV exposure timer for alternative processes — defaults: `{"duration":900}`
  - **Photo Walk Timer** (`photo-walk`): Timed photo challenges and sprint sessions — defaults: `{"work":900,"rest":120,"rounds":4}`

### 🏋️ Fitness

Interval training, Tabata, HIIT, stretching, and rest timers for every workout style. Free, no app needed.

- URL: https://gotimer.org/fitness
- Presets (5):
  - **HIIT Timer** (`hiit`): Configurable high-intensity interval training — defaults: `{"work":40,"rest":20,"rounds":8}`
  - **Tabata Timer** (`tabata`): Classic 20/10 protocol — 8 rounds, 4 minutes — defaults: `{"work":20,"rest":10,"rounds":8}`
  - **Stretching Timer** (`stretching`): Hold timer with exercise sequences — defaults: `{"work":30,"rest":10,"rounds":10}`
  - **EMOM Timer** (`emom`): Every Minute On the Minute workout timer — defaults: `{"work":60,"rest":0,"rounds":10}`
  - **Rest Timer** (`rest-timer`): Quick countdown between sets — defaults: `{"duration":90}`

### 🧘 Wellness

Meditation, breathing exercises, sleep timers, and fasting trackers for your daily wellbeing routine.

- URL: https://gotimer.org/wellness
- Presets (4):
  - **Meditation Timer** (`meditation`): Guided mindfulness with interval bells — defaults: `{"duration":600,"interval":300}`
  - **Breathing Timer** (`breathing`): Box breathing, 4-7-8, and Wim Hof exercises — defaults: `{"work":4,"rest":4,"rounds":10}`
  - **Sleep Timer** (`sleep`): Gentle countdown for wind-down routines — defaults: `{"duration":1800}`
  - **Fasting Timer** (`fasting`): Track intermittent fasting windows — defaults: `{"duration":57600}`

### 🎯 Productivity

Pomodoro, study sessions, ADHD focus timers, classroom activities, and presentation timing. Get more done.

- URL: https://gotimer.org/productivity
- Presets (5):
  - **Pomodoro Timer** (`pomodoro`): 25-minute focus sessions with 5-minute breaks — defaults: `{"work":1500,"rest":300,"rounds":4}`
  - **Study Timer** (`study`): Timed study blocks with break reminders — defaults: `{"work":2700,"rest":600,"rounds":3}`
  - **ADHD Focus Timer** (`adhd-focus`): Low-distraction timer with shorter intervals — defaults: `{"work":900,"rest":300,"rounds":4}`
  - **Classroom Timer** (`classroom`): Large display activity timers for teachers — defaults: `{"duration":600}`
  - **Presentation Timer** (`presentation`): Keep talks and meetings on schedule — defaults: `{"duration":900}`

### 🍳 Kitchen

Cooking timers, egg timers, and multi-timer support for when you’re juggling multiple dishes. Precision for every chef.

- URL: https://gotimer.org/kitchen
- Presets (4):
  - **Cooking Timer** (`cooking`): General cooking timer with preset durations — defaults: `{"duration":600}`
  - **Egg Timer** (`eggs`): Perfect soft, medium, and hard boiled eggs every time — defaults: `{"duration":420}`
  - **Multi-Timer** (`kitchen-multi-timer`): Run multiple simultaneous timers for different dishes — defaults: `{"timers":[{"name":"Main Dish","duration":1800},{"name":"Side","duration":900}]}`
  - **Bread Proofing Timer** (`bread-proofing`): Long-form rise timer with temperature notes — defaults: `{"duration":3600,"interval":1800}`

---

## API Reference

Base URL: https://gotimer.org/api/v1

### GET /timers

List all timer strategies with names, descriptions, and default configs.

```bash
curl https://gotimer.org/api/v1/timers
```

### GET /timer-presets

List all presets. Optionally filter by category.

```bash
curl https://gotimer.org/api/v1/timer-presets
curl "https://gotimer.org/api/v1/timer-presets?category=fitness"
```

### GET /timer-url

Generate a shareable timer URL. The timer starts immediately.

```bash
curl "https://gotimer.org/api/v1/timer-url?type=countdown&duration=300"
curl "https://gotimer.org/api/v1/timer-url?type=pomodoro"
curl "https://gotimer.org/api/v1/timer-url?type=hiit&work=40&rest=20&rounds=8"
```

### GET /timer-url/embed

Generate embeddable timer HTML and URL.

```bash
curl "https://gotimer.org/api/v1/timer-url/embed?type=countdown&duration=300&theme=dark&size=standard"
```

### GET /challenges

List all public challenges with scores.

```bash
curl https://gotimer.org/api/v1/challenges
```

### GET /challenges/:id

Get challenge details, leaderboard, and game history.

```bash
curl https://gotimer.org/api/v1/challenges/CHALLENGE_UUID
```

### POST /challenges

Create a new challenge. Requires API key.

```bash
curl -X POST https://gotimer.org/api/v1/challenges \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"name": "Chess Rivalry", "format": "head-to-head", "timer_type": "chess-clock"}'
```

### POST /challenges/:id/join

Join a group challenge with a join code. Requires API key.

```bash
curl -X POST https://gotimer.org/api/v1/challenges/CHALLENGE_UUID/join \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"join_code": "TIMER-1234"}'
```

---

## MCP Server (gotimer-mcp)

GoTimer provides a Model Context Protocol server for AI assistants like Claude.

### Installation

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "gotimer": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "gotimer-mcp"],
      "env": {
        "GOTIMER_API_KEY": "your-api-key"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

### Environment Variables

| Variable | Description | Required |
|----------|-------------|----------|
| GOTIMER_API_KEY | API key for authenticated endpoints (create/join challenges) | For write ops |
| GOTIMER_API_URL | Override API base URL (default: https://gotimer.org/api/v1) | No |

### Tools (10)

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| list_timer_types | Returns all available timer strategies |
| list_timer_presets | Lists pre-configured presets, optionally filtered by category |
| list_public_challenges | Lists all public challenges with scores |
| get_leaderboard | Gets leaderboard and game history for a challenge |
| create_challenge | Creates a new challenge (requires API key) |
| join_challenge | Joins a group challenge with a join code (requires API key) |
| create_timer | Creates a live timer and returns a shareable URL |
| create_pomodoro | Convenience wrapper for Pomodoro focus timers |
| get_timer_url | Returns a pre-filled setup page URL (timer does not auto-start) |
| get_embed_code | Generates HTML embed code for a timer widget |

---

## Embedding Timers

Embed GoTimer widgets on any website with an iframe.

### Example

```html
<iframe src="https://gotimer.org/embed/countdown?duration=300"
  width="480" height="400" frameborder="0"
  allow="autoplay" loading="lazy"
  style="border-radius: 8px;"></iframe>
```

### Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| type | string | Strategy or preset ID (e.g. countdown, pomodoro, hiit) |
| duration | number | Duration in seconds |
| theme | string | light, dark, or auto (default: auto) |
| size | string | compact, standard, or large (default: standard) |
| controls | string | full, minimal, or none (default: full) |
| autostart | boolean | Whether timer starts automatically (default: false) |
| label | string | Optional label displayed on the timer |

### Size Dimensions

| Size | Width | Height |
|------|-------|--------|
| compact | 300px | 250px |
| standard | 480px | 400px |
| large | 640px | 500px |

---

## Who Is GoTimer For?

- **🎲 Board Games**: Keep game night moving with free, mobile-friendly timers. No app download, no signup — just pick a timer and play.
- **🎞️ Photography**: Film development timers, reciprocity calculators, and darkroom tools. Free, browser-based, safelight-safe.
- **🏋️ Fitness**: Interval training, Tabata, HIIT, stretching, and rest timers for every workout style. Free, no app needed.
- **🧘 Wellness**: Meditation, breathing exercises, sleep timers, and fasting trackers for your daily wellbeing routine.
- **🎯 Productivity**: Pomodoro, study sessions, ADHD focus timers, classroom activities, and presentation timing. Get more done.
- **🍳 Kitchen**: Cooking timers, egg timers, and multi-timer support for when you’re juggling multiple dishes. Precision for every chef.
- Anyone needing a simple, distraction-free timer in the browser
